pi_items.source: Web search and direct HTTP fetch verification. toscrape.com is a publicly documented web scraping practice environment.

Web search results confirm both subdomains. Direct HTTP 200 responses verified for books.toscrape.com and quotes.toscrape.com. HTML analysis of toscrape.com main page confirms links to both subdomains.
Verified in setup_task.sh (line 28-30) which creates the export directory and references this exact path in export_result.sh (line 10).
Verified in setup_task.sh (line 29-31) which creates the reports directory and references this exact path in export_result.sh (line 11).

Python web crawler tested toscrape.com ecosystem. Limited crawl of 30 pages yielded 30 unique URLs (2 from toscrape.com, 28 from quotes.toscrape.com). Demonstrates minimum 20 URLs is readily achievable and likely conservative. Actual crawl would find more.

privileged_info_summary: The task targets toscrape.com, a real, publicly accessible website specifically designed for web scraping practice. It has two confirmed subdomains: books.toscrape.com and quotes.toscrape.com, both returning HTTP 200. The task requires agents to enable 'Crawl All Subdomains' in Screaming Frog, then crawl toscrape.com and export results to a CSV file with a minimum of 20 URLs. This is achievable, as a simple crawl of 30 pages yielded 30 unique URLs. The export and report paths are correctly configured in the task setup scripts.
